goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'norwich' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'leave after 09:15' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'stazione restaurant and coffee bar'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '5 people' at '17:45' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from norwich and should go to cambridge
The train should leave after 09:15 and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called stazione restaurant and coffee bar
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 17:45 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
